zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk於1265年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Robert le Copere26歲，母親Helyonora Le Copere21歲。他和Mrs Symond Coupre至少有1個兒子。他去世於1350年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk于1265年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Robert le Copere26岁，母亲Helyonora Le Copere21岁。他和Mrs Symond Coupre至少有1个儿子。他去世于1350年在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coupre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cooper  .

variants.name: Cowper
meanings: English Scottish: variant of   Couper   or   Cooper  .

variants.name: Cooper
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker and repairer of wooden vessels such as barrels, tubs, buckets, casks, and vats, from Middle English couper, cowper (apparently from Middle Dutch kūper, a derivative of kūp ‘tub, container’, which was borrowed independently into English as coop). The prevalence of the surname, its cognates, and equivalents bears witness to the fact that this was one of the chief specialist trades in the Middle Ages throughout Europe. In North America, the English surname has absorbed some cases of like-sounding cognates from other languages, for example Dutch Kuiper .
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic) Kupfer and Kupper (see Kuper ).
Dutch: occupational name for a buyer or merchant, Middle Dutch coper.

nameMeanings.name: Del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Counte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Kuntz   or   Kunz  .

variants.name: Kuntz
meanings: German: variant of   Kunz   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Americanized or Germanized form of Czech, Polish, Slovenian, Slovak, or Croatian   Kunc  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Symond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk was born in 1265, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Robert le Copere, was 26 and his mother, Helyonora Le Copere, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Symond Coupre. He died in 1350, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk est né en 1265, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Robert le Copere, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Helyonora Le Copere, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Symond Coupre. Il est décédé en 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk 1265 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert le Copere 26 und seine Mutter Helyonora Le Copere 21. Er hatte mit Mrs Symond Coupre mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk è nato il nel 1265 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert le Copere, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Helyonora Le Copere, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Symond Coupre. Morì nel 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.Fife, Scotland: スコットランドフィフ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewykが1265年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Robert le Copereは26歳，母Helyonora Le Copereは21歳であった。彼はMrs Symond Coupreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1350年に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk(이)가 1265년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert le Copere(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Helyonora Le Copere(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mrs Symond Coupre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk nasceu em 1265, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Robert le Copere, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Helyonora Le Copere, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Symond Coupre. Ele faleceu em 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk родился в 1265 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert le Copere было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helyonora Le Copere, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Symond Coupre. Он умер в 1350 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Symond Coupre Del Counte de Berewyk nació en 1265, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Robert le Copere, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Helyonora Le Copere, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs Symond Coupre. Murió en 1350, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
